title: Giving Feels Expansive and Fearless
subtitle: An affirmation for releasing the worry that generosity will leave you with less
excerpt: A brief affirmation for when giving money, time, or energy triggers a pull of reluctance. The statement names generosity as something that expands rather than depletes — and that each act of giving multiplies what comes back.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 58 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use before making a gift, paying a bill with resistance, or any moment when giving feels like a loss rather than a choice.

content.text: A short affirmation for before you give. The fear-of-depletion pattern shows up as a specific moment: hand reaching for the wallet, or the second-guess before sending money. The affirmation names the act of giving as expansive — the thing that makes space for more, rather than the thing that takes it away.
The affirmation is most useful at the moment of giving, not in the abstract. Say it immediately before you make the transaction or the gesture.
I allow giving to feel expansive and fearless, knowing every act of generosity multiplies my wealth.
Say it three times out loud before you give. If the reluctance stays after three repetitions, use the Day 58 tapping practice first, then return to the act of giving.
Adapted from Day 58 of The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
